A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT GEORGE MCCOLM'S Motion To Dismiss Entire Action For Five Year Failure To Prosecute: Mr. McColm's CCP 170.6 Challenge filed against Judge Warren is denied as untimely.
